name: Sliders - Windows apps | Microsoft Learn

name: Implement new flyout menu for audio in Windows 10 · Issue #8580 - GitHub
snippet: New flyout menu for audio interface on Windows 10. Replace audio interface that appears when hitting play/pause and using the volume slider on keyboard.

name: Quickie #1: Giving the volume control a makeover in Windows 10 - Medium
snippet: This is a pretty simple and modern UI that fits with almost everything else on Windows 10. Right now, the volume control feels out of place
